page_metadata.biotools__summary: A multiple protein structure alignment server which creates an all-to-all pairwise alignment using a combinatorial extension program and then using Monte Carlo optimization methods conducts an iterative global optimization.  Results are formatted using JOY.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A multiple protein structure alignment server which creates an all-to-all pairwise alignment using a combinatorial extension program and then using Monte Carlo optimization methods conducts an iterative global optimization.  Results are formatted using JOY.
